result:
All artifacts complete and validation passes.

## Proposal created: `compound-strength-app`

**Location:** `openspec/changes/compound-strength-app/`

**Artifacts:**
- **proposal.md** — Why (mid-workout math is the friction; this sprint = source + tests, no runtime) and 13 new capabilities to build, with non-goals and impact.
- **design.md** — Architecture for code-review-only delivery: a **pure framework-free domain core** (`src/domain/`) so behavior is verifiable in Node; `Program` interface + registry with pinned canon per program; inventory-bounded plate math; timestamp-based timer with injected native side-effects; SQLite via a narrow `Database` interface testable in Node; completion-driven session state machine; Expo Router flows; isolated iOS Live Activity scaffold.
- **specs/** — 13 capability specs (`onboarding`, `exercise-catalog`, `strength-programs`, `workout-engine`, `set-logging`, `weight-selector`, `plate-calculator`, `rest-timer`, `warmup-ramp`, `progress-tracking`, `live-activity`, `data-persistence`, `settings`), each with SHALL/MUST requirements and WHEN/THEN scenarios — including per-program canon (5/3/1 TM wave + AMRAP + cycle bump, GZCLP cascade, nSuns 9-set, Madcow ramp, PPL 6-day, linear).
- **tasks.md** — 17 dependency-ordered task groups, domain-first (catalog → plate math → e1RM/PR/ramp → program framework → 7 programs → engine → persistence → services → state → screens → Live Activity → verification/handoff).

**A few decisions I made** (flagged in design's Open Questions — push back if any are wrong): pin nSuns to the 5-day LP scheme and GZCLP to the original Cody LeFever stages; pounds-only with 45 lb default bar; one active program with all 7 seeded at onboarding.

**All artifacts created! Ready for implementation.**

Run `/opsx:apply` to start implementing.
